response: A senior recruiter in the pharmaceutical industry, specifically focused on production and supply chain roles in France, is responsible for identifying and attracting qualified candidates for high-level positions within organizations involved in the manufacturing, distribution, and logistics of pharmaceutical products. This role typically involves sourcing candidates, conducting interviews, and ensuring that the right talent is selected for roles that require expertise in regulatory compliance, operational efficiency, and supply chain management. The recruiter may also work closely with internal teams to align candidate qualifications with organizational needs and may be involved in developing recruitment strategies and candidate sourcing channels tailored to the French market.
